{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54773", "cvss": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-347", "name": "Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature"}], "description": "### Impact
An unauthenticated remote attacker who can place a SOAP header lexically before `wsse:Security` can embed a `ds:Signature` of their choosing inside that header and cause the server to verify the attacker-supplied signature instead of the one carried in the security header.

#### Preconditions
Exploitation requires the endpoint be configured with an endorsing supporting token binding, and the attacker constructs a `ds:Signature` whose `KeyInfo` resolves through the receive-side token resolver to a key under the attacker’s control. Both are conditions outside the attacker’s direct control on a generic deployment.

### Patches
Fixed in CoreWCF v1.8.1 and v1.9.1

### Workarounds
Use a security token resolver that only accepts references to issuer-pinned X.509 chains (the default when expecting a static set of signing certificates).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00238, "percentile": 0.14745}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jc6x-rj79-w4mx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T20:46:43Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jc6x-rj79-w4mx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jc6x-rj79-w4mx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54773"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T20:46:43Z", "references": ["https://github.com/CoreWCF/CoreWCF/security/advisories/GHSA-jc6x-rj79-w4mx", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jc6x-rj79-w4mx"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/CoreWCF/CoreWCF/security-advisories/GHSA-jc6x-rj79-w4mx", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/CoreWCF/CoreWCF", "summary": "CoreWCF: WS-Security signature substitution via document-wide Signature lookup", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T20:46:44Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jc6x-rj79-w4mx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.8.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "CoreWCF.Primitives"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.8.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "1.9.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "CoreWCF.Primitives"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.9.0, < 1.9.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: CoreWCF: WS-Security signature substitution via document-wide Signature lookup
